subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enamored of that Countenance and enthralled by those locks of the Beloved of all worlds! Thy verses were indeed worthy of praise and commendation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مفتون روی و مجنون موی دلبر آفاق اشعار فی الحقیقه سزاوار تعریف و توصیف بود
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @praise and encouragement
